notes: The game will run nearly flawlessly with some complicated setup. First of all the most important thing is to install windows media player 11 within the the games prefix. Follow the instructions in the answer at (https://askubuntu.com/questions/652424/windows-media-player-11-12-with-wine) to get it installed. Without this the game will hang on a black screen after it shows the capcom logo. Once wmp11 is installed, install xact with wine tricks. Do not worry if games for windows live(GFWL) says it fails to install, just click cancel/close and relaunch the game and it should work.
title: Resident Evil™ 5/ Biohazard 5®

notes: As well as installing windows media player 11(wmp11) you may need to find and move the xlive.dll(from the Games for Windows Live redist. installation, or from an installation of windows that has GFWL already installed) into the games install folder so it is in the same directory as the games executable.

title: Resident Evil™ 5/ Biohazard 5®

notes: Used unofficial GFWL removal patch to install. Had to set game's Wine prefix to Windows XP and install WMP11_x64, executing `wineboot` between components. To avoid overscan on my 7:3 monitor, set resolution to 4:3 option that matches my monitor's vertical resolution and it window boxes perfectly.
title: Resident Evil™ 5/ Biohazard 5®

notes: I used the gfwl patch. Then renamed videos to .wmv text files and used d9vk for better performance and now have solid fps
title: Resident Evil™ 5/ Biohazard 5®

notes: It still fails to load out of the box. It looks like there is tweaks.
title: Resident Evil™ 5/ Biohazard 5®

notes:
After the game is installed do the following:
1.-  Run the game, it'll try to install "Game for Windows" but it will fail. After that the game will crush.
2.- Change the wine version of the game to Windows XP (21690).
3.- Download from the web the wmp11 installer (64 bits).
4.- Install it how is described here: https://askubuntu.com/questions/652424/windows-media-player-11-12-with-wine (consider using the right names in my case wmfdist11-64.exe for the codec and wmp11-64.exe for the media player). You have to install it in the game wine prefix with something like this:
-  $ env WINEPREFIX=/home/YOURUSER/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/21690/pfx/ wine wmfdist11-64.exe
-  $ env WINEPREFIX=/home/YOURUSER/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/21690/pfx/ wine wmp11-64.exe
5.- Install Game for Windows with the following:
-  $ env WINEPREFIX=/home/YOURUSER/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/21690/pfx/ winetricks gfw
title: Resident Evil™ 5/ Biohazard 5®

notes: Just finished the game. Runs perfect after manual installation of GFWL and WMP11. Use D9VK for best performance. Crashed on startup few times but perfectly stable ingame.
title: Resident Evil™ 5/ Biohazard 5®
